title: Code for: Optimal canopy light-use strategy shapes global greenness dynamics (NCOMMS-25-24941B)
description:
This repository contains the MATLAB implementation of the PL model (potential production × light-use strategy), together with the analysis scripts, packaged gridded inputs and figure-generation code that reproduce all main and supplementary figures of the manuscript:

Zhu, Z., Wang, H., Zhou, B., Cai, W., Harrison, S. P., De Kauwe, M. G., & Prentice, I. C. Optimal canopy light-use strategy shapes global greenness dynamics. Nature Communications (2026).

Contents:

  • code/main_figures_ncomms.m — master script that regenerates Figs. 1–6 and the supporting supplementary panels from the packaged inputs.
  • code/utility/ — plotting and statistical helpers (violin, scatter, lat-band, geoshow, etc.).
  • data/ — bundled GeoTIFF stacks (MODIS fAPAR, PL-model fAPAR, potential production A0, ROI mask, TRENDY-v9 ensemble summaries) and CSV/MAT metadata (FluxInformation.csv, gpp_global_pgc.mat, trendy_data_output*.mat).
  • figure/ — default export directory for the 600 dpi PNG outputs.

The MATLAB Mapping Toolbox is required. The repository should be cited as:

Zhu, Z. et al. Code for ‘Optimal canopy light-use strategy shapes global greenness dynamics’, greenness, https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXXX (2026).
